subcodes.title: Ziyarat-Namiy-i-Awliya (Vahid)
subcodes.first_line: The first wave of exaltation from the ocean of grace of thy Lord, the Compassionate, be upon thee, who art the essence of the Qur'án
subcodes.first_line_orig: اول موج علا من بحر رحمه ربک الرحمن علیک یا سر الفرقان و مستسر البیان اشهد
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for martyrs, @eulogies; reminiscences, @martyrs and martyrdom, @visitation Tablets, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
